evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: You'll balance fast, practical solutions with thoughtful, strategic guidance on analytics architecture and process improvement.
evidence.domain_risk: Deep understanding of business intelligence and analytics engineering workflows
evidence.collaboration_width: shared customer Slack channels; cultivating relationships with community members
evidence.data_team_maturity: You'll stay current with our latest features, including our evolving AI capabilities (using Lightdash for our own analytics and demos)
evidence.jd_authorship: Active daily in shared customer Slack channels, responding to user questions, triaging bugs, and jumping on calls to pair-program through complex issues
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: You'll spend a significant portion of your time directly helping users in Slack and on calls — diagnosing issues, answering questions, and pair-programming through problems.
evidence.autonomy_level: You'll be active daily in shared customer Slack channels, responding to user questions, triaging bugs, and jumping on calls to pair-program through complex issues.

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: You'll balance fast, practical solutions with thoughtful, strategic guidance on analytics architecture and process improvement.
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: The JD explicitly frames the role as balancing speed with strategic depth, and the company values emphasize shipping at 80% while the role emphasizes teaching and best practices.
domain_risk_quote: Deep understanding of business intelligence and analytics engineering workflows
domain_risk_reasoning: The role is in the BI/analytics domain affecting business decisions but lacks explicit financial, compliance, or regulatory risk signals that would indicate high risk.
data_team_maturity_quote: You'll stay current with our latest features, including our evolving AI capabilities (using Lightdash for our own analytics and demos)
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Lightdash has established internal analytics using their own product, suggesting a mid-stage data function that exists and is producing something but is not yet a large, highly specialized organization.
jd_authorship_quote: Active daily in shared customer Slack channels, responding to user questions, triaging bugs, and jumping on calls to pair-program through complex issues
jd_authorship_reasoning: Responsibilities are specific and actionable with concrete daily activities (Slack support, pair-programming, demos) rather than generic collaboration statements.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: You'll spend a significant portion of your time directly helping users in Slack and on calls — diagnosing issues, answering questions, and pair-programming through problems.
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role primarily serves analytics engineers and data teams (external users of Lightdash) with technical support and community knowledge-sharing, aligning with the internal_data stakeholder category.
autonomy_level_quote: You'll be active daily in shared customer Slack channels, responding to user questions, triaging bugs, and jumping on calls to pair-program through complex issues.
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role receives scoped work (user support, community advocacy, content creation) and executes it responsively, rather than defining direction or priorities for the analytics function.
ai_role_quote: You'll stay current with our latest features, including our evolving AI capabilities (using Lightdash for our own analytics and demos)
ai_role_reasoning: Company uses AI tools for its own analytics, but role doesn't require candidate to use AI coding tools or build AI infrastructure.
testing_framing_quote: You'll spend a significant portion of your time directly helping users in Slack and on calls — diagnosing issues, answering questions, and pair-programming through problems.
testing_framing_reasoning: Role emphasizes customer support and community engagement with no testing ownership, quality responsibility, or testing tools mentioned.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: You'll balance fast, practical solutions with thoughtful, strategic guidance on analytics architecture and process improvement.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Framing centers on practical delivery and architecture guidance; no operational reliability (SLOs, incidents) or compliance-driven (regulatory, audit, trustworthiness) concerns emphasized.
